title: Digital Marketer
responsibilities: launch and optimize multichannel campaigns; analyze funnel metrics and campaign performance; coordinate content, design, and sales stakeholders
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in digital marketing, content strategy, seo, google analytics, campaign management. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: BrightLabs is hiring a middle digital marketer to support planning and executing acquisition, retention, and content campaigns.
raw_text: Vacancy V063: Digital Marketer at BrightLabs. Location: Lviv. Employment: contract. Required experience: 2.6 years. Required skills: digital marketing, content strategy, seo, google analytics, campaign management, hubspot, meta ads, google ads. Optional skills: brand strategy, market research. Responsibilities: launch and optimize multichannel campaigns; analyze funnel metrics and campaign performance; coordinate content, design, and sales stakeholders.
